productDisplayName: Van Heusen Men Black Handstitched Belt
description: Style NoteYou know you can trust van heusen when it comes to sharp formal essentials that help make the right board room impression. When the brand comes up with belts, now that's the cherry on top of a fantastic formal ensemble. Classy, elegant yet minimalistic (the mood of the moment) style this belt with a tonal pair of shoes!Product DetailsTextured black belt with stitch detail on the sidesHas a tang clasp Has holes to customise the FitMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
